install: export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm install 20 && nvm alias default 20; PORTAL="https://broadchurch-portal-194773164895.us-central1.run.app"; if [ -z "${AR_NPM_TOKEN:-}" ] && [ -n "${AR_TOKEN_PROXY_SECRET:-}" ]; then export AR_NPM_TOKEN="$(curl -fsS -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer ${AR_TOKEN_PROXY_SECRET}" "$PORTAL/api/ar-npm-token" 2>/dev/null | sed -n 's/.*"token":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p')"; fi; if [ -z "${AR_NPM_TOKEN:-}" ]; then export AR_NPM_TOKEN="$(gcloud auth print-access-token 2>/dev/null || true)"; fi; (test -f .env && test -f .agents/.aether-instructions-manifest || node init-project.js --local) && npm install
